reviewCadence: Every business day during review, then twice daily for the first three public launch days.
escalationPath: Support owner triages user reports, release owner assesses severity, engineering owner coordinates fix or rollback.
hotfixCriteria: Critical crash, sign-in outage, scoring data loss, account deletion failure, or security/privacy incident.
rollbackCriteria: Unrecoverable scoring data loss, widespread sign-in failure, severe policy issue, or unresolved critical crash trend.

thresholds.criticalCrash: Any reproducible crash in sign-in, active scoring, recovery, or game completion.
thresholds.signInFailureRate: Investigate above 2 percent after excluding provider outages.
thresholds.supportVolume: Investigate any cluster of three similar issues in one day.
